form.formComment: Third race start. Strong on debut as favourite; won by 0.8 len at this track Mdn-Sw May 11 over 1100m defeating Woolclasser carrying 56.5kg at $3.20. Returned from break ran on from midfield; 3rd of 10 at this track Cl1 on March 22 over 1100m, 2 len behind Royal Detective with 59kg at $3.20. Fitter and tough to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for a clear run at the 450m.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation when last of 14 at Launceston Cl1 February 25 2024 over 1200m, 13 len behind La Folie Douce carrying 55.5kg at $15. When resuming last campaign second of 13 at this track Mdn-Sw December 17 2023 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Turf Puzzle with 58.5kg at $51. Prefer to see how he returns.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin and laid in over the concluding stages.
Slow to begin, bumped with My Mac, shortly after the start.
Began awkwardly and shifted out bumping with another runner.

form.formComment: At the latest run came from midfield; 3rd of 12 at Launceston Cl1 on March 27 over 1200m, slow going 1.5 len behind Geegees Downpour carrying 55kg at $10. The start before that 3rd of 11 at Launceston Cl1 on March 13 over 1200m, on a slow track; 2.5 len behind Zambezi Blonde with 54kg at $41. Going well and is among the hopes.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months ran on from midfield; 2nd of 10 at this track Cl1 on March 22 over 1100m, 1.5 len behind Royal Detective with 55.5kg at $8.50. Previously second-up 8th of 14 at this track Cl1 on November 23 over 1200m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Daytona Diva with 57kg at $51. Fitter and can go one better.
